diagrams.title: Switch Statement Flow Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the control flow of a switch statement with multiple cases, default, and break statements
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how switch selects and executes the appropriate case block

diagrams.title: Switch vs If-Else Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing equivalent logic using switch and if-else-if ladder
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to use switch over if-else and see structural differences

diagrams.title: Fall-Through Behavior Illustration
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the difference between switch with break and without break
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the often misunderstood fall-through behavior in switch statements
